title: API For retrieving user role & permissions +MFA status
excerpt:
Hi,

posts.author: saasdev (dev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We didn’t find any API for retrieving a user role (including custom role) and the list permissions of this role. In addition, an API for retrieving MFA (multi-factor authentication) of the account or for specific user.
We’d be glad if you could attach a reference if such an API exists (or such data can be extracted from audit logs).

Thanks.

Thanks.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, this isn’t available at the moment. I’ll move this thread into the feature requests section so other users can vote on it! I can see how this would be useful.
